query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS changelog_entries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  version VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  changeType ENUM('feature', 'improvement', 'fix', 'security', 'breaking') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'feature',
  category VARCHAR(100),
  highlights JSON,
  releaseDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  isPublished BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  isMajor BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS changelog_user_views (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  changelogId INT NOT NULL,
  viewedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  dismissed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  dontShowAgain BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_user_changelog (userId, changelogId)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS app_versions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  version VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  buildNumber INT,
  releaseNotes TEXT,
  releaseDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  isStable BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  downloadUrl VARCHAR(500),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
